categorization_rationale: Net-new service component with new public ingress and new external egress; no FedRAMP Certification class change and no federal customer data introduced, so not transformative and not a class change; not regular/routine maintenance, so not routine-recurring. Resolves to Adaptive per SCN-CSO-EVA. Sits at the upper edge of Adaptive due to the new non-FedRAMP-authorized external interconnection (Anthropic); the absence of federal customer data is what keeps it out of Transformative.
short_description: Adds the gated "Silk Reeling Mirror" app: a public, HTTP-Basic-Auth-gated API Gateway HTTP API -> Python 3.13 ZIP Lambda serving a browser SPA; the Lambda calls the Anthropic API to generate movement-feedback text.
reason_for_change: New self-service capability addition to the site.
customer_impact: New customer/operator-responsibility control: operator-set HTTP Basic Auth credential (POAM-021). SAML/IdP federation is the recommended upgrade. No change to existing customers' configuration responsibilities.
plan_and_timeline: Gated deploy (create_silk_reeling=true) -> OPA + Checkov + tfsec gate -> Syft/Grype SCA over the built artifact -> VDR report regenerated -> post-implementation secure-configuration verification (Adaptive requirement) -> KSI signal + OSCAL SSP re-emitted. Controls/KSIs to re-verify: RA-5/VDR-*, SA-9/CA-3, SC-7, AC-3/IA-2, AU-2/AU-3, SC-12/SC-28.
new_risks_summary: POAM-019..024 (all risk-accepted, Low residual) plus the new-ecosystem SCA blind-spot, remediated by adding Syft/Grype SCA of the built Lambda+SPA artifact to CI feeding the VDR aggregator (RA-5/VDR-CSO-DET).
status: Implemented — live in production (first prod deploy 2026-06-03 via PR #82; latest redeploy 2026-06-06)
notify_by: No necessary parties (no sponsor/customers); the public GitHub push that publishes the certification data is the notification (SCN-CSO-NOM / SCN-ADP-NTF)
